productDisplayName: Doodle Girls's Princess Purple Teen Top
description: CompositionPurple round neck top made of 100% cotton, with lightly puffed short sleeves, sequinned print on the chest and gathering at the hemline with light rufflesWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycleDo not bleachTumble dry low or lay flat to dryWarm iron when neededDo not iron on printTransform your little darling into a princess with this crew neck top from doodle. The lightly puffed sleeves and chest print add an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a tiny skirt and colourful slippers to complete her princess look.
